decision_taxonomy.label: Local human approval recorded
decision_taxonomy.meaning: A named human reviewer accepted this asset/route for local sandbox evidence only.
decision_taxonomy.guard: Public gate stays blocked and a local review certificate is still required before sandbox-ready status.

decision_taxonomy.label: Needs more evidence
decision_taxonomy.meaning: The asset remains in human review because source, rights, file, scale, layer or quality checks are not complete.
decision_taxonomy.guard: No sandbox, public gate or publication can be inferred from this note.

decision_taxonomy.label: Public use blocked
decision_taxonomy.meaning: The reviewer explicitly keeps web/download/R2 release closed.
decision_taxonomy.guard: Local metadata may remain visible for review; public use needs a separate rights and owner review.

decision_taxonomy.label: Rejected for exchange use
decision_taxonomy.meaning: The asset/route is not acceptable for exchange workflows.
decision_taxonomy.guard: Keep it out of Blender, ArchiCAD and public promotion paths until a new review replaces this decision.

certificate_seed.note: This session is evidence for later Architecture Kosmos quality certification, but it does not certify the asset yet.

blockers: Web/public route remains private because public_use_allowed or rights are not public-safe.

checklist.label: Source basis was read and is plausible for local review.
Rights status and public gate were checked by a human.
At least one local file/profile was opened or inspected.
Scale, origin, naming and layer/surface mapping were checked.
Reviewer checked whether the asset is generic, coherent and not low-quality AI output.
Reviewer can choose a route decision for archicad.

decision_options.when: default while the human checklist is still open
decision_options.effect: records a local note only; no approval and no public use

decision_options.when: only after a human reviewer inspected Kosmo Axis Marker for route archicad
decision_options.effect: records local route evidence; still no public gate and no upload

decision_options.when: default for generated or unclear rights
if quality, rights, source basis or export mapping are not acceptable
decision_options.effect: keeps the asset out of exchange workflows

commands.record_needs_review: npm run kosmo:asset-review-decision -- --library examples/kosmo-assets/kosmo-asset-demo/library.json --asset axis-marker-svg-001 --route archicad --decision needs-review
commands.record_local_approval: npm run kosmo:asset-review-decision -- --library examples/kosmo-assets/kosmo-asset-demo/library.json --asset axis-marker-svg-001 --route archicad --decision approve-local --confirm-human-review --reviewer "REPLACE_WITH_REVIEWER_NAME"
commands.keep_public_blocked: npm run kosmo:asset-review-decision -- --library examples/kosmo-assets/kosmo-asset-demo/library.json --asset axis-marker-svg-001 --route archicad --decision block-public

next_actions: Open local asset files/profiles and complete the human checklist for every open row.
Record only explicit human decisions with kosmo:asset-review-decision.
Keep public downloads, R2 uploads and D1 writes disabled.
